title: coleus yemenensis
intro: Coleus yemenensis is a plant species that belongs to the mint family and is native to the tropical regions of Yemen. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Coleus yemenensis include its ability to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Coleus yemenensis typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
